Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core is upgrading technological capabilities (Target 9.5) in the financial industry through 'Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence' and '產學合作' (industry-academia collaboration).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Inferred link to Target 10.2 (economic inclusion). Improved '信用評分卡建構' (credit scorecard construction) could potentially lead to fairer lending, but this is not an explicit focus.
